_publications._publicationTitle: Pharmacogenomic Synthetic Lethal Screens Reveal Hidden Vulnerabilities and New Therapeutic Approaches for Treatment of NF1-Associated Tumors.

_contextSnippet: These compounds were well tolerated, with none of the single agents or combinations tested in this model eliciting signs of toxicity in the mice, including therapy-related lethargy or gastrointestinal issues
details: All single agents and combinations were well tolerated with no signs of toxicity including therapy-related lethargy or gastrointestinal issues
